title: Personalised Chopping Board Cheese Board Oak Wooden Cutting Board Custom Gift for Couple Engagement Wedding Anniversary Mothers Day Christmas Birthday (Any Text)
features: The laser-engraved chopping board is the ideal gift for couples or families, also great as a housewarming. Wedding Gifts for Couples, Anniversary, Valentines or Birthday present.
Personalised Chopping board available in 6 designs with families names or names.
This board is made from natural oak wooden. Measuring approx.29*20*1.2 cm. Hand Finished in UK
The custom cutting board can be used for a variety of things including chopping and slicing and features a small groove to catch crumbs and liquids.
Not dishwasher safe, hand wipe only.
description: Product Description: 1. A unique bespoke personalised wooden chopping board, perfect for any role. Laser engraved an extra message of your choice on the board. 2. Perfect for the food lover you know that can whip up an incredible meal - this rectangular chopping board makes a useful yet ideal gift for your families or friends to use whilst preparing food, or displaying in the home. 3. This Laser Engraved Personalised Wooden Chopping Board is the ideal addition to any home due to its durability, strength and traditional appearance. Made from natural oak wooden, it is extremely the most ecological wood available in the housewares industry at the moment. The chopping board can be used for a variety of things including chopping and slicing and features a small groove to catch crumbs and liquids.
